cases.prompt: 유저 프로필에 아바타 업로드 기능 추가해줘

assertions.text: The agent reads related code and summarizes the change before writing any code.
The agent checks file placement and import direction before creating new files.
The agent writes a failing test before implementation (RED step).
The agent runs pre-merge cleanup scan before committing.

cases.prompt: Fix the login timeout bug — users get kicked out after 5 minutes

assertions.text: The agent writes a reproduction test that fails (proving the bug exists).
The agent fixes the code and the reproduction test now passes.
The agent runs the full test suite to ensure no regressions.
The agent commits with fix(auth): prefix.

cases.prompt: 결제 모듈에 환불 기능 추가해줘. 부분 환불도 가능해야 해.

assertions.text: The agent triggers Scenario Planning Mode (multi-state, external API) for the refund feature.
The agent produces scenarios across Happy/Sad/Bad/Boundary/State categories at minimum.
The agent runs code-health-guard reactive checks after implementation.
